signin.title: Sign In to Continue
signin.body: Watch the countries you're applying to and get notified the moment a rule changes.
upgrade.title: Never miss a rule change
upgrade.body: Country Watch is a Pro feature. Watch up to 5 countries (10 on Expert) and we'll email you the moment a real policy change is published for them.
watching.title: Watching ({{count}}/{{limit}})
watching.empty: You're not watching any countries yet.
updates.title: Recent updates
updates.empty: No policy updates for your watched countries yet. We'll email you the moment something changes.
toast.limit: Your {{plan}} plan can watch up to {{limit}} countries. Remove one to add another.
toast.add_error: Could not add this country. Please try again.
